cases.name: lexical-layout.simple-layout
cases.notes: Representative layout-sensitive let binding in the executable subset.

cases.name: lexical-layout.nested-layout
cases.notes: Nested layout blocks in conditional and let expressions.

cases.name: lexical-layout.explicit-braces
cases.notes: Explicit brace and semicolon layout form.

cases.name: expressions.arithmetic
cases.notes: Arithmetic precedence over executable Int.

cases.name: expressions.subtraction
cases.notes: Subtraction through the executable Num Int dictionary.

cases.name: expressions.multiplication
cases.notes: Multiplication through the executable Num Int dictionary.

cases.name: expressions.division
cases.notes: Checked concrete Int division primitive.

cases.name: expressions.comparison
cases.notes: Ord comparisons and lazy Boolean conjunction.

cases.name: expressions.if-expression
cases.notes: If-expression desugaring to Bool case.

cases.name: expressions.lambda-application
cases.notes: Lambda expression applied immediately.

cases.name: expressions.let-expression
cases.notes: Local let binding in expression position.

cases.name: expressions.case-bool
cases.notes: Explicit case over Bool.

cases.name: expressions.sections
cases.notes: Left and right operator sections desugar to typed Core lambdas, including lazy Boolean section semantics.

cases.name: modules.single-module-main
cases.notes: Single explicit Main module.

cases.name: modules.two-module-import
cases.notes: Same-directory module graph with qualified import, export list, and constructor child import.

cases.name: declarations.top-level-function
cases.notes: Top-level function binding.

cases.name: declarations.top-level-signature
cases.notes: Top-level type signature checked against binding.

cases.name: declarations.multiple-definitions
cases.notes: Multiple top-level value definitions in one module.

cases.name: declarations.newtype-wrapper
cases.notes: Newtype constructor and pattern typing through the current boxed executable representation.

cases.name: laziness.const-unused-div
cases.notes: Unused function argument is not forced.

cases.name: laziness.lazy-let-unused-div
cases.notes: Unused let binding is not forced.

cases.name: laziness.forced-division-by-zero
cases.notes: Forced division by zero must compile but exit nonzero at runtime.

cases.name: adts.known-constructor-case
cases.notes: User ADT constructor and case alternative.

cases.name: adts.maybe-constructor-case
cases.notes: Maybe-like polymorphic constructor case.

cases.name: adts.record-fields
cases.notes: Record declaration labels, selector functions, complete record construction, and record pattern matching.

cases.name: lists-tuples.list-length
cases.notes: List literal and generated Prelude length.

cases.name: lists-tuples.tuple-case
cases.notes: Tuple expression and tuple pattern case.

cases.name: recursion.factorial
cases.notes: Recursive top-level function over Int.

cases.name: patterns.guards-as-patterns
cases.notes: As-pattern alias and guarded equations.

cases.name: types.polymorphic-id
cases.notes: Explicitly typed polymorphic identity instantiated at Int.

cases.name: types.numeric-defaulting
cases.notes: Ambiguous numeric and Eq constraints default to executable Int.

cases.name: types.monomorphism-restriction
cases.notes: Unsigned nullary value binding follows the documented executable-subset monomorphism/defaulting policy.

cases.name: types.type-synonym-expansion
cases.notes: Type synonyms expand through signatures and constructor fields before Core/native lowering.

cases.name: typeclasses.user-dictionary
cases.notes: User single-parameter class, concrete instance, and dictionary-passed method call.

cases.name: typeclasses.constraint-synonym
cases.notes: Explicit class constraint whose argument is normalized through a type synonym before dictionary elaboration.

cases.name: prelude.prelude-lists
cases.notes: Generated Prelude list functions over the supported executable subset.

cases.name: prelude.prelude-classes
cases.notes: Built-in Eq, Ord, Num, and Bool Prelude methods.

cases.name: prelude.char-runtime
cases.notes: Boxed Char literals, Char literal case alternatives, and the built-in Eq Char dictionary lower through native STG.

cases.name: prelude.char-main
cases.notes: Executable scalar Char main unboxes through the native runtime and prints as a character.

cases.name: prelude.string-char-list
cases.notes: Source string literals and string literal patterns lower to ordinary [Char] lists; length and show output consume them as lists.

cases.name: prelude.string-output
cases.notes: Direct string literals and list functions over strings feed native putStrLn/print through ordinary [Char] values.

cases.name: prelude.string-show-output
cases.notes: Built-in Show Int and Show Bool results are native [Char] values consumable by putStrLn.

cases.name: prelude.string-char-patterns
cases.notes: Native execution covers explicit Char cons patterns and string literal patterns over source string values.

cases.name: prelude.broad-show
cases.notes: Broader Show coverage for Char, String, generic lists, nested string lists, print, and defaulted numeric list elements.

cases.name: io.printing
cases.notes: Current supported IO printing slice with exact stdout.

cases.name: io.normal-examples
cases.notes: Normal IO examples after real String and Show support: do-bind, explicit >>=, putStrLn, and print over Char, String, and lists.

cases.name: egglog.known-constructor
cases.notes: Known-constructor Core optimizer case must agree with --no-egglog.

cases.name: negative.type-error
cases.notes: Ill-typed arithmetic must fail with a type diagnostic.

cases.name: negative.unbound-variable
cases.notes: Unbound variable must fail during renaming.

cases.name: negative.duplicate-binding
cases.notes: Duplicate top-level binding must be rejected.

cases.name: negative.bad-module-import
cases.notes: Missing same-directory imported module must fail module graph loading.

cases.name: negative.malformed-layout
cases.notes: Malformed layout must fail during Haskell 2010 parsing.

cases.name: unsupported.superclass-default-method
cases.notes: Superclass constraints and default class methods remain outside the implemented class slice.

cases.name: unsupported.deriving-eq
cases.notes: Deriving syntax parses, but deriving does not synthesize class instances yet.

cases.name: unsupported.instance-context
cases.notes: Instance contexts are intentionally outside the current concrete-instance dictionary slice.

cases.name: unsupported.method-specific-constraint
cases.notes: Method-specific class constraints are rejected by the explicit class-constraint placeholder.

cases.name: unsupported.kind-checking
cases.notes: Partial type-constructor use must be rejected by kind checking.

cases.name: unsupported.handle-io
cases.notes: Handle-based IO and do-bind statements are beyond the current output-only IO slice.

cases.name: patterns.irrefutable-pattern
cases.notes: Irrefutable/lazy patterns match without forcing the scrutinee and force mismatches only through demanded binders.

cases.name: unsupported.package-module-search-path
cases.notes: Package and library module search paths are not implemented; imports only load same-directory files.
